name: DSA Platform Difficulty Analysis
description:
This interactive bar chart provides a comparative analysis of major coding platforms used for Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) practice. The difficulty rating (scaled 1-10) is derived from community consensus regarding problem complexity, mathematical requirements, and time constraints.

Key Insights:
  • Codeforces & AtCoder: Dominate the high-difficulty spectrum, focusing heavily on competitive programming and advanced mathematical logic.
  • LeetCode: Positioned as the industry standard for interview preparation, balancing algorithmic rigor with practical application.
  • HackerRank: Serves as an excellent entry point for beginners, focusing on foundational syntax and basic logic.
